join.loadingDescription: We are processing your invitation link.
join.loginRedirectDescription: Please sign in with a magic link. After that, the invitation continues automatically.
join.invalidDescription: This invitation link is no longer valid.
join.acceptFailedDescription: The invitation could not be processed.
join.expiredHint: If the link has expired, please ask the inviting person for a new invitation.

errors.loadFailed: The invitation could not be loaded.

welcome.title: Welcome

existing.title: This invitation is set up for an existing team.
existing.text: The flow focuses more on alignment, roles, tensions, and concrete collaboration in your current day-to-day work.

preFounder.title: This invitation is set up for early matching.
preFounder.text: The flow helps you make expectations, differences, and fit visible before entering closer collaboration.

welcome.profileIntro: Set up your core profile briefly. CoFoundery uses your name, role, focus, and intention so reports, matching, and the workbook can connect cleanly to your profile.
welcome.profileOptional: You can add more profile details later.

statusErrors.emailMismatch: This invitation does not match the email address of your current profile.
statusErrors.alreadyClaimed: This founder slot has already been connected to another profile.
statusErrors.activationFailed: The team connection could not be completed right now. Please try again in a moment.
statusErrors.invalidToken: This founder link is no longer valid or could not be found.

teamInvite.notFoundText: This link is no longer valid or could not be connected to an open team start point.
teamInvite.title: Matching start for two founders
teamInvite.invitedByAdvisor: {advisorName} invited you to start a shared founder matching context in Cofoundery Align.
teamInvite.invitedGeneric: You have been invited to start a shared founder matching context in Cofoundery Align.
teamInvite.intro: Your step is intentionally lightweight: connect your profile, confirm your start, and then wait until {counterpart} has started as well. Only then will your shared flow be activated.
teamInvite.signInText: Sign in with {email} so your founder slot can be connected cleanly.
teamInvite.wrongEmailTitle: Please sign in with the right email
teamInvite.wrongEmailText: This founder slot is intended for {slotEmail}. You are currently signed in as {currentEmail}.
teamInvite.activateText: This link belongs to {email}. Confirm your start in the matching flow with one click.
teamInvite.waitingText: Your slot is already connected. Once {counterpart} has started as well, your shared matching context will activate automatically.
